Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4e79f0dc71a39681001435d0e13a0e70bceaebc658490cb18aad9cfaf1c85607/d46ca223-a66c-476b-ba5e-04b70d9f1964/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
